title: 2021-2025 Toyota Sienna Hybrid 2nd Row Seat Removal And Airbag Warning Light Disabling Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to installation and removal procedure of the 2nd row rear seats and the way for how to bypass the SRS system warning light detection due to the airbags and seatbelt pre-tensioners being unplugged/disconnected.

items.name: Resistors to bypass the airbag warning
Automotive trim and clip removal kit
3/8" drive flex head digital torque wrench
